texto: As for opportunities, there is room for improved product quality and better service and raising our technology standard. In addition, we should have a certain share of the global market. However, we should consider new industries, such as resource development.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Liang Wengen sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “As for opportunities, there is room for improved product quality and better service and raising o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, service, quality, útil em momentos de quality.
